directive: Do not modify generated translated documentation under docs/ja/, docs/ko/, or docs/zh/; make documentation changes in the corresponding source docs outside those generated translation directories.
rationale: The repository identifies docs/ja, docs/ko, and docs/zh as generated translated documentation. Direct edits there are likely to be overwritten by the documentation translation pipeline, so source documentation should be changed instead.

source_evidence.excerpt: `docs/`: MkDocs documentation source; do not edit translated docs under `docs/ja`, `docs/ko`, or `docs/zh` (they are generated).
Documentation workflows include `make build-docs`, `make serve-docs`, and `make build-full-docs` for translations and build.

trace_intent.trace_allowed_effect_compliant.jsonl: Reads generated translated docs but writes only a source documentation file outside `docs/ja`, `docs/ko`, and `docs/zh`.
